derivation_steps: Treat each numerator and denominator as an ownership-scaled look-through amount; do not apply fund weight a second time.
Divide 130 by 40 to obtain the accepted ratio-of-sums result 3.25.
Compute 0.20 * 3.0 + 0.80 * 3.5 = 3.40 only as the explicitly rejected weighted-ratio alternative.
